crossRefs.label: Warm up operation thoroughly and check if the following temperature conditions are met
Reset the internal resistance value of the 12V battery

items: Before starting the inspection, the following items should be checked
Ensure that the correct procedure was followed to charge the 12V battery
12V battery If external charging is performed with the terminal connected, the current measurement by the battery sensor may not be correct and the idling stop may not work.
Check that the wiring of electronic components is not directly connected to the minus (-) terminal of the 12V battery, and if so, remove it.
Electronic component connections must be via battery sensor
If any of the above applies, disconnecting the battery sensor coupler in the ignition OFF (LOCK) mode may improve the symptoms of the idling stop not working.

blocks.text: 1. Ensure that the following conditions are met 2. Warm up operation thoroughly and check if the following temperature conditions are met ​ 3. Perform test runs under the following conditions 4. Repeat steps 1-3 several times to see if the idling stop works. If it does not work, Idling Stop System failure diagnosis.

refs.label: Warm up operation thoroughly and check if the following temperature conditions are met

items.text: Idling Stop System OFF Switch OFF
Master power negative pressure is secured (idling stops are more frequently prohibited at high altitudes due to the difficulty of securing master power negative pressure).
D indicator light is not flashing

refs.label: Reset the internal resistance value of the 12V battery

items.text: Hood not open (hood latch switch OFF)
Turn off electrical loads such as A/C, rear defroster, headlights, etc.
Stops in 5-15 seconds from a speed of 40 km/h
Brake pedal should be depressed steadily until the vehicle comes to a stop (no pumping or hard braking).
Brake pedal is still depressed after stopping.
